_note: 6 evolution-seed vehicle BOMs ported verbatim from 10_execution/ui/Minimal.html (~L5090-5620). Keyed by evolution seed. Used by generate_batch.py headless runner. KEEP IN SYNC with Minimal.html if BOMs change.

parts.label: Primary Structure (3U)
parts.spec: 3U CubeSat primary frame, Al 7075, PC/104 standoffs, deployable rail guide grooves (CDS spec)

parts.label: Solar Panel x 4 (deploy)
parts.spec: Deployable solar panel wing, 3U size, spring-loaded hinge, burn-wire release, deployment damper

parts.label: Antenna Deployer x 2
parts.spec: Tape-spring UHF/S-band antenna deployer, stowed flat, burn-wire release, latching tab

parts.label: Reaction Wheel x 3
parts.spec: Small reaction wheel assembly, brushless motor, momentum 0.005-0.05 Nms, isolation mount

parts.label: Star Tracker Mount
parts.spec: Star tracker optical bench mount, CTE-matched, baffled sun shield, line-of-sight +-1deg

parts.label: Payload Optics Bench
parts.spec: EO payload optics bench, thermal stability, optical baffles, focal plane interface, lens mounts

parts.label: Cold Gas Thruster x 4
parts.spec: Cold gas propulsion thruster bracket, 4 thrusters cross-pattern, 50mN class, plumbing manifold

parts.label: Separation Spring Plate
parts.spec: P-POD or ISIPOD separation interface plate, spring pusher contact, kill switch arm

parts.label: EPS Solar Charging Module
parts.spec: EPS solar charging subsystem: solar_panel_face inputs, removable battery_tray, eps_board_slot, power_connector keying, service cover, mass budget <480g

parts.label: CDH Avionics Stack
parts.spec: Command/data handling avionics stack: obc_board, stack_harness, debug_port_access, board standoffs, connector labels, grounding point, mass budget <260g

parts.label: Thermal Path / Radiator Strap Evidence
parts.spec: Thermal_path closure module: radiator_face, thermal_strap_note, vent_hole, battery-to-frame conduction pad, service-visible thermal datum, inspection label, mass budget <120g

parts.label: Integration Harness + Datum Spine
parts.spec: Integration_harness closure spine with harness_channel, connector_keying, assembly_datum pads, routing clips, service hatch, reciprocal interface labels, inspection checklist marks

robot_arm.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
robot_arm.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

tiltrotor.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
tiltrotor.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

small_launch_vehicle.label: Small Launch Vehicle (sounding)
small_launch_vehicle.desc: Saturn V-structured, Electron-class 2-stage smallsat launcher demonstrator

parts.label: Stage 1 Combustion Chamber Display Dummy
parts.spec: Non-functional educational engine_display cartridge: combustion_chamber_dummy, injector-face visual insert, cutaway_window, slide_rail, no pressure/ignition/flight capability

parts.label: Stage 1 Bell Nozzle Display Shell
parts.spec: Non-functional bell_nozzle_shell display mock with cutaway_window, bolt_circle_dummy, throat label, removable engine_display_cartridge interface

parts.label: Turbopump Assembly Display Dummy
parts.spec: Non-functional turbopump_assembly_dummy with impeller_dummy, service cutaway bay, slide_rail, inspection label, no pump performance claim

parts.label: Propellant Tank Dummy (LOX)
parts.spec: Primary_structure tank_dummy barrel for display only: propellant_tank_dummy, dome caps, alignment_key, inspection_window, no pressure vessel claim

parts.label: Propellant Tank Dummy (Fuel)
parts.spec: Primary_structure fuel tank_dummy barrel for display only: propellant_tank_dummy, fill/drain labels, alignment_key, bolt_circle_dummy, no fluid service

parts.label: Interstage Adapter + Separation Datum
parts.spec: Separation_display mock: separation_plane_datum, clamp_band_dummy, interstage_datum, alignment_key, no energetic device or pyro instruction

parts.label: Stage 2 Engine Display Dummy
parts.spec: Non-functional stage_engine_mock with bell_nozzle_shell, cutaway_window, engine_display_cartridge slide_rail, educational label only

parts.label: Payload Fairing Display Shell
parts.spec: Primary_structure payload_fairing/nose_cone display shell with split seam, inspection window, acoustic blanket labels, no flight-performance claim

parts.label: Fin Set x 4 Display Mock
parts.spec: Primary_structure fin_set display mock with root tabs, alignment_key, bolt_circle_dummy, inspection callouts, no stability/performance claim

parts.label: Avionics Bay Mock Tray
parts.spec: Avionics_bay educational tray with board_standoff, harness_passthrough, connector labels, EMI shield mock, no ordnance or flight computer authority

parts.label: Battery/Power Display Module
parts.spec: Power_display battery_module dummy with access_panel, keyed connector label, service cover, mass budget note, no live energy system

parts.label: Recovery Bay Display Dummy
parts.spec: Recovery_bay educational display dummy with deploy_door, hinge, parachute volume label, inspection window, no deployment charge or flight recovery instruction

parts.label: Integration Inspection Ring
parts.spec: Integration_inspection ring with assembly_datum pads, inspection_window, checklist_callout, connection type labels, load-path closure marks

long_range_recon_wing.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
long_range_recon_wing.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

haptic_glove.label: Force-Feedback Haptic Glove Pair
haptic_glove.desc: Wearable force-feedback exo-glove pair for VR grasp resistance, serviceable actuator cartridges, linkages, wrist band, and dorsal control module

parts.label: Dorsal Control Module x 2
parts.spec: Snap-in dorsal electronics and battery module, tool-less lid, wireless board bay, service label and cable exits

parts.label: Finger Exo Linkage Cartridge x 10
parts.spec: Two-segment exoskeleton finger linkage cartridge, single-pin removable, hinge datum pads, thimble slip interface

parts.label: Flexion-Resistance Actuator x 10
parts.spec: Plug-in tendon brake/clutch actuator module, knuckle row mount, cable pulley, connector pocket, service access

parts.label: Adjustable Wrist Band x 2
parts.spec: Quick-release wrist band, cable raceway, soft-contact interface, buckle, dorsal module anchor

parts.label: Cable Raceway + Harness Cover x 2
parts.spec: Snap-fit cable routing cover from wrist band to fingers, strain relief slots, inspection windows

parts.label: Finger Thimble Interface Set
parts.spec: Replaceable fingertip thimbles, slip-clearance sockets, soft liner cue, per-finger label and hinge pin access

parts.label: Palm Sensor Plate x 2
parts.spec: Palm-side flex/bend sensor channel plate, IMU mount pad, per-finger sensor channel exits, sensor connector pocket, washable liner interface

parts.label: Battery + Power Module x 2
parts.spec: Wrist battery pocket with quick-swap door, li-ion pack 2S 18650, BMS access window, power connector keying, charge LED window

parts.label: Wiring Loom + Service Loop Set
parts.spec: Knuckle-crossing wiring loom with service loops, strain relief at every flex boundary, flex-rated bend radius, power vs signal channel separation

parts.label: Knuckle Mount Rail x 2
parts.spec: Dorsal knuckle row mounting rail, actuator plug-in pockets, datum pads per finger station, fastener pattern and removal path

parts.label: Fit Calibration + Safety Release Set
parts.spec: Wearable_structure closure module: wrist_quick_release, soft_liner_zone, finger_clearance gauges, don/doff datum labels, emergency release pull tab

parts.label: Service Port + Flex-Wiring Inspection Cover
parts.spec: Flex_wiring closure module: service_loop inspection cover, strain_relief, bend_radius_note, connector keying, charge/debug service port, power vs signal separation label
